sglang.title: Fix incorrect LoRA weight loading for fused gate_up_proj
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
During testing, I identified two bugs introduced in my previous PR for supporting phi-4-mm.


(Major impact) I introduced fused LoRA weight support in my prev PR, however, I did not correctly handle gate_up_proj shape. This problem was not caught earlier because pytorch implicitly handled

sglang.title: fix(PD-disaggregation): Can not get local ip
sglang.author: storyicon
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

While performing a PD-disaggregation deployment, I encountered an issue with the get_local_ip_by_remote function. From the source code, I observed that it first attempts to obtain the local IPv4 address by connecting to 8.8.8.8. If this fails, it silently falls back to connecting to 2001

sglang.title: [FIX] mmmu bench serving result display error (#6525)
sglang.author: Arist12
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This pull request addresses Issue #6525, which concerns incorrect prompt extraction for VLMs (Vision-Language Models). Due to a flawed regular expression, the prompt was not parsed correctly, leading to improper model behavior and missing TTFT and ITL values in the result table.

sglang.title: Improve profiler and integrate profiler in bench_one_batch_server
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
We can use python3 -m sglang.bench_one_batch_server to generate profile files for prefill/decode on various batch sizes.
Launch a server
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct

Benchmark
python3 -m sglang.bench_one_batch_server --model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instru

sglang.title: [Minor] Always append newline after image token when parsing chat message
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
I noticed different token sequence between SGLang and vLLM in case of multiple image URLs. As per conversation offline in Slack channel, we suspect this might be a mistake in the codebase, and the participants agreed to "fix" it by always appending newline after image token when parsing c

vllm.title: [FEAT][ROCm] Add AITER grouped topk for DeepSeekV2
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR introduces a new aiter kernel, grouped_topk, from the aiter package. This kernel is used for model architectures and configurations like Deepseek-V2. The previously integrated kernel, biased_grouped_topk, from aiter package in #17955  is used for model architectures and configurations like D

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix for issue 17396
vllm.author: frreiss
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR contains a patch for the bug reported in issue #17396. The LoRA weights embedding layers can have a different amount of padding than the weights of the base model, depending on what hardware the model and LoRA adapters are running on. The existing code in the bgmv_expand() kernel compensates

vllm.title: [ROCm][Kernel] Add gfx950 support for skinny gemms
vllm.author: charlifu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds support of gfx950 for rocm skinny gemms.

vllm.title: [P/D] NixlConnector use cache device index for memory registration
vllm.author: ptarasiewiczNV
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently NixlConnecotr uses rank to specify device for NIXL memory registration. This doesn't work in multi-node case. This PR changes that to use torch device index of the cache directly.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix multi-node offline data-parallel
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #18553.
Thanks @yiz-liu for reporting and suggesting the fix.

vllm.title: [Misc] add return token strs for tokenize
vllm.author: reidliu41

vllm.title: [Misc][Benchmark] Add support for CustomDataset
vllm.author: ekagra-ranjan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes: #14036 (review) and #18509
Currently, online serving benchmark only loads some specified dataset. This PR adds support for CustomDataset which can load arbitrary datasets for benchmarking. It accepts dataset in jsonl format and can be extended to other format since it converts the input data

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix EAGLE3 broken logits
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR incorrectly checks the loaded_weights and will always set draft_id_to_target_id to None (sorry!).
This PR fixes the bug by checking the updated name instead of 'd2t', checks for inclusion instead of exact-match for a more reliable check in case it gets moved in the future, and adds an assert

vllm.title: [Core] Rework dtype resolution
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Key changes:

float32 models will be downcasted to whatever dtype is prioritized by the platform (defined by the first item in current_platform.supported_dtypes). This means that models may be downcasted to bfloat16 instead of float16.
Attempt to detect safetensors dtype from HF Hub repo if the dtyp

vllm.title: [LoRA] Support dynamically initialize `packed_modules_mapping` for VLM with arbitrary components
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some VLM series like InternVL and Ovis can have various languages backbone and ViTs, which causes a complicated packed_modules_mapping for LoRA and BNB support.
This PR allows initializing packed_modules_mapping from VLM's components dynamically, so we don't need to copy all packed_modules_mapping f

vllm.title: [BugFix] fix data parallel construct ipv6 url addres
vllm.author: lengrongfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #18986
because ipv6 construct tcp url format is not ipv4, so need use ipv6 url string tcp://[2605:340:cd51:a00:2a6:1aa4:9970:acec]:53280 to connect.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix incorrect metrics shutdown error log message
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Introduced in #17546. We should only call mark_process_dead when we're using prometheus multiprocessing mode (with > 1 API servers).
ERROR 05-31 01:04:14 [prometheus.py:77] Error during metrics cleanup: expected str, bytes or os.PathLike object, not NoneType

Thanks to @lgeiger for reporting.
